creator: rb@nugman.de
text:
Thanks for the hint. I'm using the CrashPlan engine on a headless server (see https://support.code42.com/CrashPlan/4/Configuring/Use_CrashPlan_on_a_headless_computer) and it seems that the auto-update feature doesn't work in this configuration.
The strange thing is that my local machine says, that the backup would be up to date while the Crashplan website tells, that it haven't backed up in 8 days. So it might be also something related to the account upgrade. But to be sure I wanted to see if the upgrade to 7.9.0 might help.
